name: OptionsStrat
description_short: Visual options strategy builder and profit/loss calculator with real-time pricing, IV analysis, and P&L simulations for all options strategies.
description_long:
OptionsStrat is a specialized options analysis platform that makes complex options strategies accessible through intuitive visual profit/loss diagrams, real-time pricing, and powerful simulation tools. The platform is designed for options traders of all levels who want to understand the risk/reward profile of any options strategy before placing a trade.

The core feature is the Strategy Builder, which allows traders to construct any combination of calls, puts, and stock positions, then instantly see the P&L diagram, breakeven points, max profit, max loss, probability of profit, and Greeks. The platform supports all standard strategies (verticals, iron condors, butterflies, straddles, calendars, etc.) and custom multi-leg combinations.

OptionsStrat provides real-time options pricing, implied volatility analysis, IV rank/percentile, unusual options activity scanning, and an earnings calendar with expected moves. The mobile app is particularly popular among traders who want quick P&L analysis on the go. The free tier offers basic strategy visualization, while the Premium plan ($29.99/mo) unlocks real-time data, advanced analytics, and unlimited strategy saves.
pros: Best visual P&L diagrams for options strategies
Intuitive strategy builder — great for learning
Real-time Greeks and IV analysis on Premium
Excellent mobile app for on-the-go analysis
cons: No broker integration for trade execution
Premium pricing is relatively high for a visualization tool
